name: homepage-landing-redesign
title: Homepage landing redesign
creator: lijin
notes: 2026-04-23 exact-reference checkpoint. The user placed the approved screenshot in repo at 首页参考/image.png and clarified that the homepage must match that reference exactly in both layout and imagery. The implementation therefore stopped trying to recreate the design with cards and text blocks, copied the approved reference into frontend/app/assets/homepage-reference/neon-cyber-tavern-reference.png, replaced home.tsx with a direct image render, and added transparent hotspots so /, /discover, and /create remain reachable without changing the visible composition. The temporary ProductShell width extension was reverted because the homepage no longer composes through ProductShell. Fresh validation: npm --prefix .\frontend run typecheck, npm --prefix .\frontend run build, curl.exe --noproxy * -sS -D - http://127.0.0.1:8950/ returned 200 OK. 2026-04-24 user accepted the exact-reference homepage state for now and requested commit/push.
